rust.name: block_dim_x
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: reading the read-only CTA X dimension has no memory, participation, synchronization, or pointer-validity preconditions.

intrinsics.summary: Returns the X dimension of the current cooperative thread array (CTA).

rust.name: block_dim_y
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: reading the read-only CTA Y dimension has no memory, participation, synchronization, or pointer-validity preconditions.

intrinsics.summary: Returns the Y dimension of the current cooperative thread array (CTA).

rust.name: block_dim_z
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: reading the read-only CTA Z dimension has no memory, participation, synchronization, or pointer-validity preconditions.

intrinsics.summary: Returns the Z dimension of the current cooperative thread array (CTA).

rust.name: block_idx_x
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: reading the read-only CTA X index has no memory, participation, synchronization, or pointer-validity preconditions.

intrinsics.summary: Returns the X index of the current cooperative thread array (CTA) within its grid.

rust.name: block_idx_y
rust.safe_allowlist_reason: reading the read-only CTA Y index has no memory, participation, synchronization, or pointer-validity preconditions.

rust.safe_allowlist_reason: reading the read-only grid Y dimension has no memory, participation, synchronization, or pointer-validity preconditions.

stages.detail: The recognized bare declaration materializes convergent, nocallback, memory(argmem: read), readonly, and captures(none) attributes.
Emitted ldmatrix.sync.aligned.m8n8.x4.shared.b16 with a four-register result struct.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the selected Rust LLVM ldmatrix probe
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the emitted x4 PTX for sm_75.
CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepts the declaration and produces LTOIR.
CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepts the modern typed intrinsic for these targets.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR inline PTX ldmatrix.sync.aligned.m8n8.x4.shared.b16
stages.detail: This is the selected libNVVM lowering until typed-intrinsic support is uniform across supported targets.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR inline PTX ldmatrix.sync.aligned.m8n8.x4.shared.b16
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 nvJitLink completed the selected inline-PTX route to a device binary.

intrinsics.summary: Loads four 8×8 b16 matrices cooperatively from shared memory and returns this lane's four packed register fragments.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.13.1.1 Atomic reduction and atomic operations: atom

stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM backend emitted the exact native packed bf16x2 global atomic-add instruction.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the selected Rust LLVM packed-atomic probe
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas accepted the exact bf16x2 inline-PTX instruction for sm_90.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR side-effecting inline PTX atom.global.add.noftz.bf16x2 with =r,l,r,~{memory}
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted the exact native bf16x2 inline-PTX route at compute_90.

stages.representation: retained cuda-oxide packed_atomic_add kernel containing side-effecting inline PTX atom.global.add.noftz.bf16x2
stages.detail: cargo oxide emit-ltoir produced 2,760-byte compute_90 LTOIR; link_ltoir -arch=sm_90 produced a 3,968-byte cubin; cuobjdump -sass showed ATOMG.E.ADD.BF16x2.RN.STRONG.GPU (and the sibling F16x2 instruction).

intrinsics.summary: Atomically adds two packed bf16 lanes in global memory and returns the two independently observed old lane values.

target.ptx_isa_section: 9.7.13.1.1 Atomic reduction and atomic operations: atom

stages.detail: The selected Rust LLVM backend emitted the exact native packed f16x2 global atomic-add instruction.

stages.representation: PTX emitted by the selected Rust LLVM packed-atomic probe
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 ptxas (whose supported floor is sm_75) accepted the sm_70/PTX-6.2 backend output when assembled forward for sm_75.

stages.representation: legacy NVVM IR side-effecting inline PTX atom.global.add.noftz.f16x2 with =r,l,r,~{memory}
stages.detail: CUDA 13.3 libNVVM accepted the exact native f16x2 inline-PTX route at its supported compute_75 profile floor.

stages.representation: retained legacy-NVVM kernel containing side-effecting inline PTX atom.global.add.noftz.f16x2
stages.detail: compile_ltoir produced 1,920-byte compute_75 LTOIR; link_ltoir -arch=sm_75 produced a 2,984-byte cubin; cuobjdump -sass showed probe with ATOMG.E.ADD.F16x2.RN.STRONG.GPU.

intrinsics.summary: Atomically adds two packed f16 lanes in global memory and returns the two independently observed old lane values.

rust.name: thread_idx_x
